message:
fix(core): fix ART prefix_search duplicating key bytes (ft-1pz0n)

prefix_search_recursive extended key_so_far with the node prefix
before calling collect_all, which also extends with the same prefix.
This caused returned keys to contain duplicated bytes (e.g., [0,1]
became [0,1,0,1]). Move the extension to only the non-collect path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
